info.title: ElevenLabs Speech-to-Text API
info.description: ElevenLabs Speech-to-Text API - Batch and realtime transcription endpoints. Filtered from the official ElevenLabs API spec.

post.description: Transcribe an audio or video file. If webhook is set to true, the request will be processed asynchronously and results sent to configured webhooks. When use_multi_channel is true and the provided audio has multiple channels, a 'transcripts' object with separate transcripts for each channel is returned. Otherwise, returns a single transcript. The optional webhook_metadata parameter allows you to attach custom data that will be included in webhook responses for request correlation and tracking.

parameters.name: enable_logging

schema.title: Enable request logging.
schema.description: When enable_logging is set to false zero retention mode will be used for the request. This will mean log and transcript storage features are unavailable for this request. Zero retention mode may only be used by enterprise customers.

parameters.description: When enable_logging is set to false zero retention mode will be used for the request. This will mean log and transcript storage features are unavailable for this request. Zero retention mode may only be used by enterprise customers.

parameters.name: xi-api-key

schema.description: Your API key. This is required by most endpoints to access our API programmatically. You can view your xi-api-key using the 'Profile' tab on the website.

file_extension.title: File Extension
file_extension.description: The file extension of the additional format.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: The content type of the additional format.

is_base64_encoded.title: Is Base64 Encoded
is_base64_encoded.description: Whether the content is base64 encoded.

content.title: Content
content.description: The content of the additional format.

model_id.title: Model Id
model_id.description: The ID of the model to use for transcription.

file.title: File
file.description: The file to transcribe (100ms minimum audio length). All major audio and video formats are supported. Exactly one of the file or cloud_storage_url parameters must be provided. The file size must be less than 3.0GB.

language_code.title: Language Code
language_code.description: An ISO-639-1 or ISO-639-3 language_code corresponding to the language of the audio file. Can sometimes improve transcription performance if known beforehand. Defaults to null, in this case the language is predicted automatically.

tag_audio_events.title: Tag Audio Events
tag_audio_events.description: Whether to tag audio events like (laughter), (footsteps), etc. in the transcription.

num_speakers.title: Num Speakers
num_speakers.description: The maximum amount of speakers talking in the uploaded file. Can help with predicting who speaks when. The maximum amount of speakers that can be predicted is 32. Defaults to null, in this case the amount of speakers is set to the maximum value the model supports.

timestamps_granularity.title: Timestamps Granularity
timestamps_granularity.description: The granularity of the timestamps in the transcription. 'word' provides word-level timestamps and 'character' provides character-level timestamps per word.

diarize.title: Diarize
diarize.description: Whether to annotate which speaker is currently talking in the uploaded file.

diarization_threshold.title: Diarization Threshold
diarization_threshold.description: Diarization threshold to apply during speaker diarization. A higher value means there will be a lower chance of one speaker being diarized as two different speakers but also a higher chance of two different speakers being diarized as one speaker (less total speakers predicted). A low value means there will be a higher chance of one speaker being diarized as two different speakers but also a lower chance of two different speakers being diarized as one speaker (more total speakers predicted). Can only be set when diarize=True and num_speakers=None. Defaults to None, in which case we will choose a threshold based on the model_id (0.22 usually).

additional_formats.description: A list of additional formats to export the transcript to.

file_format.title: File Format
file_format.description: The format of input audio. Options are 'pcm_s16le_16' or 'other' For `pcm_s16le_16`, the input audio must be 16-bit PCM at a 16kHz sample rate, single channel (mono), and little-endian byte order. Latency will be lower than with passing an encoded waveform.

cloud_storage_url.title: Cloud Storage Url
cloud_storage_url.description: The HTTPS URL of the file to transcribe. Exactly one of the file or cloud_storage_url parameters must be provided. The file must be accessible via HTTPS and the file size must be less than 2GB. Any valid HTTPS URL is accepted, including URLs from cloud storage providers (AWS S3, Google Cloud Storage, Cloudflare R2, etc.), CDNs, or any other HTTPS source. URLs can be pre-signed or include authentication tokens in query parameters.

source_url.title: Source Url
source_url.description: The URL of an audio or video file to transcribe. Supports hosted video or audio files, YouTube video URLs, TikTok video URLs, and other video hosting services.

webhook.title: Webhook
webhook.description: Whether to send the transcription result to configured speech-to-text webhooks.  If set the request will return early without the transcription, which will be delivered later via webhook.

webhook_id.title: Webhook Id
webhook_id.description: Optional specific webhook ID to send the transcription result to. Only valid when webhook is set to true. If not provided, transcription will be sent to all configured speech-to-text webhooks.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls the randomness of the transcription output. Accepts values between 0.0 and 2.0, where higher values result in more diverse and less deterministic results. If omitted, we will use a temperature based on the model you selected which is usually 0.

seed.title: Seed
seed.description: If specified, our system will make a best effort to sample deterministically, such that repeated requests with the same seed and parameters should return the same result. Determinism is not guaranteed. Must be an integer between 0 and 2147483647.

use_multi_channel.title: Use Multi Channel
use_multi_channel.description: Whether the audio file contains multiple channels where each channel contains a single speaker. When enabled, each channel will be transcribed independently and the results will be combined. Each word in the response will include a 'channel_index' field indicating which channel it was spoken on. A maximum of 5 channels is supported.

webhook_metadata.title: Webhook Metadata
webhook_metadata.description: Optional metadata to be included in the webhook response. This should be a JSON string representing an object with a maximum depth of 2 levels and maximum size of 16KB. Useful for tracking internal IDs, job references, or other contextual information.

entity_detection.title: Entity Detection
entity_detection.description: Detect entities in the transcript. Can be 'all' to detect all entities, a single entity type or category string, or a list of entity types/categories. Categories include 'pii', 'phi', 'pci', 'other', 'offensive_language'. When enabled, detected entities will be returned in the 'entities' field with their text, type, and character positions. Usage of this parameter will incur additional costs.

no_verbatim.title: No Verbatim
no_verbatim.description: If true, the transcription will not have any filler words, false starts and non-speech sounds. Only supported with scribe_v2 model.

entity_redaction.title: Entity Redaction
entity_redaction.description: Redact entities from the transcript text. Accepts the same format as entity_detection: 'all', a category ('pii', 'phi'), or specific entity types. Must be a subset of entity_detection. When redaction is enabled, the entities field will not be returned.

entity_redaction_mode.title: Entity Redaction Mode
entity_redaction_mode.description: How to format redacted entities. 'redacted' replaces with {REDACTED}, 'entity_type' replaces with {ENTITY_TYPE}, 'enumerated_entity_type' replaces with {ENTITY_TYPE_N} where N enumerates each occurrence. Only used when entity_redaction is set.

keyterms.title: Keyterms
keyterms.description: A list of keyterms to bias the transcription towards.           The keyterms are words or phrases you want the model to recognise more accurately.           The number of keyterms cannot exceed 1000.           The length of each keyterm must be less than 50 characters.           Keyterms can contain at most 5 words (after normalisation).           For example ["hello", "world", "technical term"].           Usage of this parameter will incur additional costs.           When more than 100 keyterms are provided, a minimum billable duration of 20 seconds applies per request.

text.title: Text
text.description: The text that was identified as an entity.

start_char.title: Start Char
start_char.description: Start character position in the transcript text.

end_char.title: End Char
end_char.description: End character position in the transcript text.

segment_on_silence_longer_than_s.title: Segment On Silence Longer Than S
Segment On Silence Longer Than S

transcripts.title: Transcripts
transcripts.description: List of transcripts, one for each audio channel. Each transcript contains the text and word-level details for its respective channel.

transcription_id.title: Transcription Id
transcription_id.description: The transcription ID of the response.

audio_duration_secs.title: Audio Duration Secs
audio_duration_secs.description: The duration of the audio that was transcribed across all channels in seconds.

MultichannelSpeechToTextResponseModel.title: MultichannelSpeechToTextResponseModel
MultichannelSpeechToTextResponseModel.description: Response model for multichannel speech-to-text transcription.

segment_on_silence_longer_than_s.title: Segment On Silence Longer Than S
Segment On Silence Longer Than S

start.title: Start
start.description: The start time of the character in seconds.

end.title: End
end.description: The end time of the character in seconds.

language_code.title: Language Code
language_code.description: The detected language code (e.g. 'eng' for English).

language_probability.title: Language Probability
language_probability.description: The confidence score of the language detection (0 to 1).

text.title: Text
text.description: The raw text of the transcription.

words.title: Words
words.description: List of words with their timing information.

channel_index.title: Channel Index
channel_index.description: The channel index this transcript belongs to (for multichannel audio).

additional_formats.title: Additional Formats
additional_formats.description: Requested additional formats of the transcript.

transcription_id.title: Transcription Id
transcription_id.description: The transcription ID of the response.

entities.title: Entities
entities.description: List of detected entities with their text, type, and character positions in the transcript.

audio_duration_secs.title: Audio Duration Secs
audio_duration_secs.description: The duration of the audio that was transcribed in seconds.

SpeechToTextChunkResponseModel.title: SpeechToTextChunkResponseModel
SpeechToTextChunkResponseModel.description: Chunk-level detail of the transcription with timing information.

message.title: Message
message.description: The message of the webhook response.

request_id.title: Request Id
request_id.description: The request ID of the webhook response.

transcription_id.title: Transcription Id
transcription_id.description: The transcription ID of the webhook response.

example.message: Request accepted. Transcription result will be sent to the webhook endpoint.

text.title: Text
text.description: The word or sound that was transcribed.

start.title: Start
start.description: The start time of the word or sound in seconds.

end.title: End
end.description: The end time of the word or sound in seconds.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of the word or sound. 'audio_event' is used for non-word sounds like laughter or footsteps.

speaker_id.title: Speaker Id
speaker_id.description: Unique identifier for the speaker of this word.

logprob.title: Logprob
logprob.description: The log of the probability with which this word was predicted. Logprobs are in range [-infinity, 0], higher logprobs indicate a higher confidence the model has in its predictions.

characters.title: Characters
characters.description: The characters that make up the word and their timing information.

SpeechToTextWordResponseModel.title: SpeechToTextWordResponseModel
SpeechToTextWordResponseModel.description: Word-level detail of the transcription with timing information.

segment_on_silence_longer_than_s.title: Segment On Silence Longer Than S
Segment On Silence Longer Than S

tags.name: speech-to-text
tags.description: Transcribe your audio files with detailed speaker annotations and precise timestamps using our cutting-edge model.
